title: 5OpenClaw用例商业2026
problem: OpenClaw started as an open-source “个人 AI agent” that runs on your own infrastructure and connects directly 到你的 real tools: browser, terminal, messaging apps, CRMs, and internal web apps. By 2026, teams increasingly use it as a system-wide 自动化 layer that can execute multi-step 工作流 端到端 instead of just suggesting next steps. Under the hood, OpenClaw combines a reasoning model with skills: browser 自动化, shell access, API connectors, and memory 搜索, plus mult
